---
title: "Security"
subtitle: "Proactive cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance for modern organizations"
description: "Blue Team cybersecurity operations, NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, threat hunting, and incident response. Protect your organization with chen.ist."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .ap { --accent: #81BD4A; }
        .ap-hero { padding: 10rem 0 8rem; text-align: center; }
        .ap-hero h1 { font-size: 4rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1.08; color: var(--bs-body-color); }
        .ap-hero .green { color: var(--accent); }
        .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.4rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 540px; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; line-height: 1.45; font-weight: 400; }
        .ap-s { padding: 7rem 0; }
        .ap-s-alt { padding: 7rem 0; background: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ap-s-alt { background: #161617; }
        .ap-s h2 { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; text-align: center; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
        .ap-s .sub { text-align: center; font-size: 1.15rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto 4.5rem; }
        .ap-tile { text-align: center; padding: 0 1rem; }
        .ap-tile i { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent); display: block; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ap-tile h3 { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
        .ap-tile p { font-size: 0.92rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 1.5; }
        .ap-link { color: var(--accent); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .ap-link::after { content: " ›"; font-weight: 300; }
        .ap-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5rem; }
        .ap-row.rev { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .ap-row-img { flex: 0 0 50%; }
        .ap-row-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 24px; }
        .ap-row-txt h2 { text-align: left; font-size: 2.8rem; }
        .ap-row-txt p { font-size: 1.08rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 0; }
        .ap-row-txt .learn { margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .ap-stats { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .ap-stat-n { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); line-height: 1; }
        .ap-stat-l { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #86868b; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 0.3rem; }
        .ap-cta { padding: 10rem 0; text-align: center; }
        .ap-cta h2 { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.035em; margin-bottom: 1rem; line-height: 1.1; }
        .ap-cta p { font-size: 1.15rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 460px; margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; }
        .ap-btn { display: inline-block; padding: 0.85rem 2.25rem; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-radius: 980px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.05rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s; }
        .ap-btn:hover { background: #6BA33A; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; }
        .ap-small { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #86868b; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .ap-small i { color: var(--accent); }
        .ap-divider { width: 40px; height: 3px; background: var(--accent); margin: 0 auto 3rem; border-radius: 2px; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) {
          .ap-hero { padding: 6rem 0 5rem; }
          .ap-hero h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
          .ap-hero p { font-size: 1.15rem; }
          .ap-s h2, .ap-cta h2 { font-size: 2rem; }
          .ap-row, .ap-row.rev { flex-direction: column; gap: 3rem; }
          .ap-row-img { flex: none; }
          .ap-row-txt h2 { text-align: center; font-size: 2rem; }
          .ap-stats { gap: 2.5rem; }
          .ap-stat-n { font-size: 2.5rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ap">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ap-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Proactive <span class="green">Security</span></h1>
    <p>Monitor threats. Respond to incidents. Stay compliant. All managed for you.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<div class="ap-s-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Security, simplified</h2>
    <p class="sub">Four services that work together to protect your business.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="ap-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
          <h3>SOC Monitoring</h3>
          <p>24/7 surveillance and real-time threat detection across your environment.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="ap-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
          <h3>Threat Hunting</h3>
          <p>Proactive search for hidden threats that evade automated detection.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="ap-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i>
          <h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3>
          <p>Gap analysis, risk frameworks, and compliance roadmaps for the EU directive.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-6 col-lg-3">
        <div class="ap-tile">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i>
          <h3>CISO as a Service</h3>
          <p>Strategic security leadership and board reporting without a full-time hire.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 1 -->
<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-row">
      <div class="ap-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Security Operations Center">
      </div>
      <div class="ap-row-txt">
        <h2>Always watching.<br>Always ready.</h2>
        <p>Our SOC operates around the clock with open-source tools you can audit. We detect, investigate, and respond — so you can focus on your business.</p>
        <div class="learn"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-link">Talk to our team</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 2 -->
<div class="ap-s-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-row rev">
      <div class="ap-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="Compliance monitoring">
      </div>
      <div class="ap-row-txt">
        <h2>NIS2 compliance.<br>From gap to green.</h2>
        <p>The directive is enforceable now. We take you from scoping and gap analysis through full compliance — with board-ready documentation at every step.</p>
        <div class="learn"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-link">Check your NIS2 status</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURE 3 -->
<div class="ap-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-row">
      <div class="ap-row-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="Infrastructure">
      </div>
      <div class="ap-row-txt">
        <h2>When the worst happens.<br>You'll be ready.</h2>
        <p>We build, test, and maintain your incident response plan. Every phase documented. Every role defined. NIS2's 24-hour reporting window — covered.</p>
        <div class="learn"><a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-link">Build your IR plan</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="ap-s-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-stats">
      <div style="text-align:center;">
        <div class="ap-stat-n">197</div>
        <div class="ap-stat-l">Days to detect (avg.)</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;">
        <div class="ap-stat-n">&lt;24h</div>
        <div class="ap-stat-l">Our response time</div>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;">
        <div class="ap-stat-n">EUR 10M</div>
        <div class="ap-stat-l">Max NIS2 fine</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="ap-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="ap-divider"></div>
    <h2>Get started with a<br>free assessment</h2>
    <p>30 minutes. No sales pitch. Just an honest look at your security posture.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="ap-btn">Book your assessment</a>
    <div class="ap-small">
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Free, no obligation</span> &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 30 minutes</span> &nbsp;&nbsp;
      <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Report within 5 days</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div><!-- end .ap -->
```
